$userCode..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && !newData.isNull() && newData.val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.val() === auth.uid && newData.val() === auth.uid))

name..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $userId && newData.isString() && newData.val().length > 0 && newData.val().length <= 80

email..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $userId && newData.isString() && newData.val().length > 0 && newData.val().length <= 160

userCode..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $userId && !data.exists() && newData.isString() && newData.val().matches(/^[A-Z0-9]{10}$/) && newData.root.child('userCodes/' + newData.val()).val() === auth.uid

$otherUserId..write: auth != null && ((newData.isNull() && (auth.uid === $userId || auth.uid === $otherUserId)) || (!newData.isNull() && (auth.uid === $userId || auth.uid === $otherUserId) && (root.child('users/' + $userId + '/incomingFriendRequests/' + $otherUserId).exists() || root.child('users/' + $userId + '/outgoingFriendRequests/' + $otherUserId).exists() || root.child('users/' + $otherUserId + '/incomingFriendRequests/' + $userId).exists() || root.child('users/' + $otherUserId + '/outgoingFriendRequests/' + $userId).exists() || root.child('users/' + $userId + '/userCode').val() === 'TREWQ12345' || root.child('users/' + $otherUserId + '/userCode').val() === 'TREWQ12345')))
